productDisplayName: Baggit Women Udaan Jhuti Purple Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This three-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Dimensions: 19 cm x 9 cmCrafted from jute genuine leatherette with thin flapMetal stud details on the flap which has a magnetic button closureBrand badge on the backOne pocket on the frontFabric inner with a separatorRemovable card holder inside with two sets of four card holders and two pockets on each sideA zippered pocket on the backCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
